name_en: MiuMiu|New Retro Matte Small Square Bag
name_cn:
MiuMiu|New Retro Matte Small Square Bag
Concise and sharp design highlights functionality, soft matte embossed logo, and a grand bag silhouette. Minimalist with no excessive decoration, the bag has ample capacity, serving as a daily commuter bag or a short-trip travel companion. Simple yet not simplistic; almost every fashion blogger has one🌱
Size:22*10.5*7.5cm
Model:5BB142
